name: Pearl
description:
__Height:__ 239 cm (7'10")
__Occupations:__ Commander of the Krieg Pirates' second unit

Pearl the Iron Wall is the commander of the Krieg Pirates' second unit. Pearl appeared to be somewhat cocky, claiming to have never lost a drop of blood in battle, as well as calling himself "dandy". He also shares Krieg's belief of using any means to achieve victory, even if it means playing dirty.
